fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact for which a duplicate has been found.

fields.name: Duplicate Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact number of the duplicate that was found.

fields.name: Separate Contacts
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the two contacts are not true duplicates, but separate contacts.

fields.name: No. of Matching Strings
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of identical search strings for the two possible duplicates.
Search strings are made up of either the first or last part of some fields from contact company information in the Contact table. They are used internally by the program to find duplicates.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact for which a duplicate has been found.

fields.name: Duplicate Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact that has been identified as a possible duplicate.
